lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਝੋਕਿ ਵਰਸਦਾ ਬੂੰਦ ਪਵੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chaare kunddaa jhok varasadaa boond pavai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The clouds are heavy, hanging low, and the rain is pouring down on all sides; the rain-drop is received, with natural ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸਭ ਊਪਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਜਲ ਪਿਆਸ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jal hee te sabh aoopajai bin jal piaas na jaae |
lines.english: From water, everything is produced; without water, thirst is not quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜਲੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਪੀਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਭੂਖ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਆਇ ॥੫੫॥
lines.translit: naanak har jal jin peea tis bhookh na laagai aae |55|
lines.english: O Nanak, whoever drinks in the Water of the Lord, shall never feel hunger again. ||55||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਤੂੰ ਸਹਜਿ ਬੋਲਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa toon sehaj bol sachai sabad subhaae |
lines.english: O rainbird, speak the Shabad, the True Word of God, with natural peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਹੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਦਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh terai naal hai satigur deea dikhaae |
lines.english: Everything is with you; the True Guru will show you this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵੁਠਾ ਛਹਬਰ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap pachhaaneh preetam milai vutthaa chhahabar laae |
lines.english: So understand your own self, and meet your Beloved; His Grace shall rain down in torrents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂਕ ਪੁਕਾਰ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kook pukaar na hovee jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: Your cries and screams of anguish have ceased; your light shall merge into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਿਮਿ ਝਿਮਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਵਰਸਦਾ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਸਭ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jhim jhim amrit varasadaa tisanaa bhukh sabh jaae |
lines.english: Drop by drop, the Ambrosial Nectar rains down softly and gently; thirst and hunger are completely gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਵਨੑਿ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੫੬॥
lines.translit: naanak sukh savana sohaaganee sachai naam samaae |56|
lines.english: O Nanak, the happy soul-brides sleep in peace; they are absorbed in the True Name. ||56||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਹੁ ਖਸਮਿ ਭੇਜਿਆ ਸਚੈ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਪਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhurahu khasam bhejiaa sachai hukam patthaae |
lines.english: The Primal Lord and Master has sent out the True Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦੁ ਵਰਸੈ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਗੂੜੑੀ ਛਹਬਰ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eind varasai deaa kar goorraee chhahabar laae |
lines.english: Indra mercifully sends forth the rain, which falls in torrents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹੇ ਤਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ਜਾਂ ਤਤੁ ਬੂੰਦ ਮੁਹਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehe tan man sukh hoe jaan tat boond muhi paae |
lines.english: The body and mind of the rainbird are happy. only when the rain-drop falls into its mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਬਹੁਤਾ ਉਪਜੈ ਧਰਤੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: an dhan bahutaa upajai dharatee sobhaa paae |
lines.english: The corn grows high, wealth increases, and the earth is embellished with beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਚਾ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape sachaa bakhas le kar kirapaa karai rajaae |
lines.english: The True Lord Himself forgives them, and showering them with His Mercy, He leads them to walk in His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin lok bhagat kare gur kai sabad samaae |
lines.english: Night and day, people worship the Lord with devotion, and are absorbed in the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaavahu kaamanee sachai sabad samaae |
lines.english: O brides, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and be absorbed in the True Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਕਾ ਸਹਜੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਕਰਿਹੁ ਸਚਿ ਰਹਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai kaa sehaj seegaar karihu sach rahahu liv laae |
lines.english: Let the Fear of God be your decoration, and remain lovingly attuned to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੋ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੫੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naamo man vasai har daragah le chhaddaae |57|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam abides in the mind, and the mortal is saved in the Court of the Lord. ||57||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਸਗਲੀ ਧਰਤੀ ਜੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਊਡਿ ਚੜਹਿ ਆਕਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa sagalee dharatee je fireh aoodd charreh aakaas |
lines.english: The rainbird wanders all over the earth, soaring high through the skies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਜਲੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਚੂਕੈ ਭੂਖ ਪਿਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai jal paaeeai chookai bhookh piaas |
lines.english: But it obtains the drop of water, only when it meets the True Guru, and then, its hunger and thirst are relieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis kaa sabh kichh tis kai paas |
lines.english: Soul and body and all belong to Him; everything is His.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਕੀਚੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: vin boliaa sabh kichh jaanadaa kis aagai keechai aradaas |
lines.english: He knows everything, without being told; unto whom should we offer our prayers?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੈ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak tisai basant hai ji satigur sev samaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, the season of spring comes to one who serves the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਏਕੋ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਕਰੇ ਪਰਗਾਸ ॥੫੮॥
lines.translit: naanak ghatt ghatt eko varatadaa sabad kare paragaas |58|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Lord is prevading and permeating each and every heart; the Word of the Shabad brings illumination. ||58||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਪਰਫੜੈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਹਰੀਆਵਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: har vutthaa man tan sabh parafarrai sabh jag hareeaaval hoe |59|
lines.english: The Lord rains His Mercy down upon him, and his mind and body totally blossom forth; the entire world becomes green and rejuvenated. ||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਸਦਾ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabade sadaa basant hai jit tan man hariaa hoe |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad brings eternal spring; it rejuvenates the mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai jin siriaa sabh koe |60|
lines.english: O Nanak, do not forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord, which has created everyone. ||60||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨਾ ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak tinaa basant hai jinaa guramukh vasiaa man soe |
lines.english: O Nanak, it is the spring season, for those Gurmukhs, within whose minds the Lord abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵੁਠੈ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਪਰਫੜੈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: har vutthai man tan parafarrai sabh jag hariaa hoe |61|
lines.english: When the Lord showers His Mercy, the mind and body blossom forth, and all the world turns green and lush. ||61||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੜੈ ਝਾਲਿ ਝਲੁੰਭਲੈ ਨਾਵੜਾ ਲਈਐ ਕਿਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaddarrai jhaal jhalunbhalai naavarraa leeai kis |
lines.english: In the early hours of the morning, whose name should we chant?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਲਈਐ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੈ ਭੰਨਣ ਘੜਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥੬੨॥
lines.translit: naau leeai paramesarai bhanan gharran samarath |62|
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Transcendent Lord, who is All-powerful to create and destroy. ||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਹਟ ਭੀ ਤੂੰ ਤੂੰ ਕਰਹਿ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਭਲੀ ਬਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: harahatt bhee toon toon kareh boleh bhalee baan |
lines.english: The Persian wheel also cries out, "Too! Too! You! You!", with sweet and sublime sounds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਸੈ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin jagat upaae har rang keea tisai vittahu kurabaan |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that Lord who created the world, and who loves it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਦਾ ਹਦੂਰਿ ਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਉਚੀ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: saahib sadaa hadoor hai kiaa uchee kareh pukaar |
lines.english: Our Lord and Master is always present; why do you cry out to Him in such a loud voice?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਹਿ ਤਾਂ ਸਹੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚਾ ਏਹੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap chhoddeh taan sahu milai sachaa ehu veechaar |
lines.english: Give up your selfishness, and then you shall meet your Husband Lord. Consider this Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਫਿਕਾ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਬੁਝਿ ਨ ਸਕਾ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: haumai fikaa bolanaa bujh na sakaa kaar |
lines.english: Speaking in shallow egotism, no one understands the Ways of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਥਕੇ ਵੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur kinai na paaeaa kar kar thake veechaar |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one finds the Lord. People have grown weary of thinking about it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣੁ ਤੁਝੈ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਵਿਹਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: van trin tribhavan tujhai dhiaaeidaa anadin sadaa vihaan |
lines.english: The forests and fields, and all the three worlds meditate on You, O Lord; this is the way they pass their days and nights forever.
